SUBJECT: The early reviews are in...

NAME,

OK, we released our SMARTS Social Marketing
video yesterday and we've been getting tons
of feedback, like:

     "Thanks for the priceless content..."

     "I learned more with your video than 2 years
     prior. WOW..."

     "Excellent Videos. Excellent Info. Well done..."

Those are just a few of the comments we've gotten
about our latest Going Natural 2.0 video.

And we must have made quite the impression,
because there are more coming in every minute. In
fact, as of this writing, there are 139 comments
on our blog.

Whoops...make that 140.

But don't take my word on it... go look at
the comments yourself:

http://www.stomperblog.com

And if you haven't seen the video yet, check
it out for yourself. Who knows, you might end
up leaving us one of those raving comments.

Here's the link to the video:

http://www.stompernet.net/goingnatural2

Meanwhile, we are working feverishly on our
SMARTS Social Marketing Strategy Guide... 
...it's coming out tomorrow...

And it's a busy week... we are already
getting email and blogs comments from people
who want to get signed up right away for our
full-out SMARTS Coaching Program.

HOWEVER, we can't accept anyone into the
program until Friday, when we officially start
taking applications.

I'm sure you can understand this - because of
the nature of the Coaching Program, we're
going to have to limit the number of spots
available. So to give everyone a fair shot,
we plan to open it up for everyone at once.

I'm sure you would agree that's the fair
thing to do.

So we're going "live" at 12:00pm eastern
time on Friday, January 11th.

In the next few days, we're going to be
sharing more information about the program so
you can make an informed decision about
whether you're a good fit.

Bottom line, since spaces are likely to be
very tight when we go live, we want to make
sure we get the right people in the program.

So that's what's coming in the next few days.

In the meantime, you should check out the
conversation on our blog right now - it's
getting pretty lively over there:

http://stomperblog.com/

Best regards,

Andy


P.S. Sleep is way overrated... I'm going to
sleep on Saturday after the Coaching Program
goes live.  :-)
